arts.ttl: Arsenal handed new William Saliba transfer boost as Real Madrid 'draw up shortlist'
arts.sum: However, the Mirror claims Real Madrid is now eyeing moves for Everton's Jarrad Branthwaite, Bournemouth's Dean Huijsen and Liverpool's Ibrahima Konate instead of Saliba. Arsenal have reportedly been handed a boost in their bid to keep star centre-back William Saliba at the club - with the Spaniards instead targeting a move for three other Premier League defenders.

arts.ttl: “One of the main reasons” | West Ham make bold promise to young striker
arts.sum: West Ham make surprising promise to young striker to convince him to join the club. Everyone is aware of the striker curse that surrounds West Ham. Although Evan Ferguson’s first 45 minutes in claret and blue were extremely promising, the fact that he’s only joined on loan means that the issue is far from being... arts.ttl: What time is Champions League draw? How to watch as Arsenal, Liverpool & Villa learn opponents
arts.sum: The 16 teams in the Champions League round of 16 have been confirmed following the knockout play-off round, with three Premier League representatives still alive

arts.ttl: How Liverpool's next five fixtures compare to Arsenal's after Aston Villa setback
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal continue to do battle in the race for the Premier League title, with the former eight points clear after drawing with Aston Villa midweek.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer update: Mikel Arteta keen to beat Liverpool to Premier League striker in summer window
arts.sum: Arsenal did not make a signing in the January transfer window but they are keen to beat Liverpool to the signing of a Premier League striker.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling or Mikel Merino? Paul Merson predicts Mikel Arteta's big Arsenal decision
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta will be faced with another difficult choice this weekend of who to play up front amid their injury crisis, after Mikel Merino scored a brace against Leicester last week as a makeshift forward

arts.sum: Arsenal are likely to be busy in the summer transfer window as they look to bolster their attacking ranks. The Gunners failed to bring in...

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed MAJOR boost in transfer pursuit of Arteta favourite
arts.sum: The Arsenal manager had hoped to sign Joan Garcia but the reported €20 million offer fell short of Espanyol’s valuation, who wanted closer to his €30m release clause due to the proximity to the end of the transfer window. However, Espanyol director Fran Garagaza admitted that Garcia could be sold for below his release clause earlier in the window as the club cannot afford to be picky with big offers.
